prose: Frontier orbital energies and gap for oxygen — DFT, tier `standard` (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, density-fit) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 3. Geometry: taken from the provided `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/oxygen/oxygen.xyz` file, not optimized. SCF converged in 7 cycles. HOMO = -8.8739616 eV, LUMO = -3.5859031 eV. The HOMO-LUMO gap is 5.2880586 eV. No warnings were reported.
